description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a flat roof and three visible stories, set on a landscaped lot with surrounding roads and sidewalks. The building features large, floor-to-ceiling windows on the front and side facades, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray concrete or stucco, with metal railings on the rooftop and staircases. The property includes a small parking area, outdoor seating, and is bordered by neatly arranged coniferous trees and manicured lawns. The rear of the house has an external staircase, suggesting access to upper floors or a rooftop terrace. The overall design is clean, geometric, and functional, typical of urban residential developments.
description: A modern, three-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, featuring outdoor seating and a rooftop terrace.
description_view_0: The house is seen from an angle showing the side and partial front, highlighting the rooftop terrace, parking area, and landscaped lawn.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entrance, large glass windows, outdoor seating, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the side and rear, showing the external staircase, more trees, and the continuation of the surrounding roads.
description_view_3: The rear view focuses on the external staircase, the back lawn, and the row of trees lining the property boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide glass doors, steps leading up, and a small paved area with outdoor seating; minimalistic and functional design.
